name: openai-mcp
description: OpenAI Platform Engineer MCP: 15 years shipping production software, on the OpenAI platform since the API launched. pick_primitive names the layer to build on (Responses API when you own the loop, Agents SDK when the SDK runs it); explain_primitive maps the platform (Responses, Agents SDK, Chat Completions, hosted tools + remote MCP, realtime/voice, embeddings, fine-tuning, cost/batch); debug_openai diagnoses migration breakage, runaway loops, context blowouts, 429s, cost blowouts, unreliable tool calls, prompt injection; migration_check audits honestly whether to move off Chat Completions (it is NOT deprecated); myth_vs_reality debunks the folklore; check_openai → openai_verdict verify every version-sensitive fact via research rather than from stale memory. Deterministic and offline. Runs as an asset under orchestrator-mcp.
